entries.definition:
ḥ–n–j–r larynx, throat, windpipe; to slay. Of this root, حَنَاجِر
ḥanājir occurs twice in the Qurʾan.

حَنَاجِر ḥanājir [pl. of حَنْجَرَة ḥanjaratun] larynx, throat *(33:10)
وَبَلَغَتِ الْقُلُوبُ الْحَنَاجِرَ fear gripped everyone [lit. and hearts rose into
the throats].
